allow: Bash(pip install -q fastapi uvicorn yt-dlp python-multipart websockets pydantic-settings)
Bash(python -c "from app.services.ytdlp_service import ytdlp_service; print\(''yt-dlp service imported successfully''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Formats:''\); [print\(f""  - {f[''ext'']} {f[''quality'']}: {f[''resolution'']}, {f[''fps_display'']}, {f[''filesize_display'']}""\) for f in d.get\(''formats'', []\)[:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); fmts=d.get\(''formats'',[]\); print\(f''Total formats: {len\(fmts\)}''\); [print\(f""{f[''ext'']} {f[''quality'']}: res={f.get\(''resolution'', ''N/A''\)}, fps={f[''fps_display'']}, size={f[''filesize_display'']}""\) for f in fmts[:3]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); fmts=d.get\(''formats'',[]\); print\(f''Total formats: {len\(fmts\)}''\); [print\(f""Format: {f[''ext'']} {f[''quality'']}""\) for f in fmts[:3]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); fmts=d.get\(''formats'',[]\); print\(f''YouTube formats: {len\(fmts\)}''\); [print\(f""{f[''ext'']} {f[''quality'']}: {f.get\(''filesize_display'', ''N/A''\)}""\) for f in fmts[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Formats:''\); [print\(f""{f}""\) for f in d.get\(''formats'', []\)[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[''formats''][0] if data[''formats''] else {}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from app.services.ytdlp_service import ytdlp_service; info = ytdlp_service.get_video_info\(''https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1GJ411x7h7''\); print\(''Keys in first format:'', list\(info[''formats''][0].keys\(\)\) if info[''formats''] else ''No formats''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(data[''formats''][0].keys\(\)\) if data[''formats''] else ''No formats''\); print\(json.dumps\(data[''formats''][0] if data[''formats''] else {}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
